description: The SIMOTICS SD next generation motors are robust, cast-iron severe duty motors designed for high performance in harsh industrial environments such as the petrochemical industry.
differentiators: Severe Duty cast-iron housing for aggressive atmospheres
IE4 Super Premium Efficiency as standard
DURIGNIT IR 2000 insulation system for high mechanical and electrical strength

documents.title: SIMOTICS low-voltage-motors - Digital Asset Management - Siemens

description: ABB's IE5 Synchronous Reluctance (SynRM) motors offer ultra-premium energy efficiency and precise speed control without the need for magnets or encoders.
differentiators: Up to 40% lower energy losses compared to IE3 motors
Precise speed control down to zero speed without an encoder

documents.title: Low voltage IE5 Synchronous reluctance motors - ABB

description: The WEG W22 Premium Efficiency motor line is designed to offer high overall performance and a lower Total Cost of Ownership through reliability, easy maintenance, and energy savings.
differentiators: Optimized cooling system to reduce noise and improve heat dissipation
Exclusive WSeal sealing system for bearing protection
High-grade cast iron frame offering superior mechanical strength
